form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 42 day let-up. First-up ran last of 10 at Urawa on December 25 over 1400m, 47 len behind Moko Punch with 55kg at $3.50. Second-up ran last of 12 at Urawa on February 23 over 1400m, 69 len behind Ningente Iina with 56kg at $6.40. The rails draw brings him right into calculations.

form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. Most recently 6th of 8 at this track on March 6 over 1500m, 8 len behind Feitian carrying 55kg at $20.30. Before that second last of 14 at this track on February 4 over 1500m, 9 len behind Awake Third with 55kg at $23.30. Nice alley and worth including.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 12 at Funabashi on March 30 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Wild Pegasus carrying 56kg at $4.20. The start before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 9 at Funabashi on March 9 over 1500m, 13 len behind Baby Face carrying 56kg at $1.70. Draws a nice alley and rates highly.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 6th of 12 at this track on February 3 over 1600m, 7 len behind Summer Madness with 56kg at $255.50. Second run from a spell 9th of 13 at this track on March 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Sithep carrying 55kg at $189.40. Fully tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 7 at Urawa on March 17 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind Juvel with 54kg at $6.20. The run before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1500m, 6 len behind Misty Rise carrying 54kg at $100.80. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign winning won by 3 len this track August 4 over 1400m defeating Rama with 54kg at $2.80. On debut third in a small field at this track July 11 over 1400m, 6 len behind Sarasa Challenge carrying 54kg at $9.80. Expected to play a major role.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at this track October 15 over 1500m, 10 len behind Haneda Brian carrying 55kg at $40.10. At his first start won by neck this track August 8 over 1400m defeating Rickey's Luck carrying 54kg at $7.70. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2 len at this track February 2 over 1400m defeating Wild Smash carrying 56kg at $2.10. Second-up 3rd of 9 at this track on March 3 over 1400m, 15 len behind Pod Despair carrying 56kg at $4.80. Brings the right form to the table. Top chance.
